faqData.question: What time should I arrive?
faqData.answer: Come early so we can take a picture of each guest.

faqData.question: What is the dress code?
faqData.answer: With a touch of mint green and no white dress for female guests.

faqData.question: Can I bring plus one?
faqData.answer: We kindly ask that only those named on your invitation attend. We are unable to accommodate additional guests.

faqData.question: Can we bring our kids along?
faqData.answer: Yes! Children are welcome to join us in celebrating our special day.
